publishedAbstract: Multus CNI is a container network interface that provides a pluggable application programming interface to configure network interfaces in Linux containers. It is considered a meta-plug-in: a CNI plug-in that can run other CNI plug-ins. OpenShift Data Foundation supports Multus and this tool should be used to validate the OpenShift configuration, NetworkAttachmentDefinitions, and underlying network compatibility. This article is supported for OpenShift Data Foundation versions 4.14 through 4.19. For version 4.20 and above, please refer to official OpenShift Data Foundation documentation.
publishedTitle: OpenShift Data Foundation - Multus prerequisite validation tool
